User.title: User
User.description: Represents an individual user registered in the system, holding core profile information and global settings. Authentication details are managed by an external system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

displayName.description: The public name chosen by the user.

photoUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp of the user's last successful login.

Center.title: Center
Center.description: Represents a study center, which is the primary organizational unit in the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Center entity.

name.description: The official name of the study center.

description.description: A brief description of the center.

subscriptionTier.description: The current subscription tier of the center (Basic, Pro, Enterprise).

maxStudents.description: The maximum number of students allowed for this center's subscription tier.

maxTeachers.description: The maximum number of teachers allowed for this center's subscription tier.

aiUsageQuotaWeekly.description: The weekly AI usage quota for the center, as defined by its subscription tier.

aiUsageQuotaMonthly.description: The monthly AI usage quota for the center, as defined by its subscription tier.

dataRetentionDays.description: The number of days for which data is retained, based on the center's subscription tier.

billingStatus.description: The current billing status of the center's subscription.

expiresAt.description: The timestamp when the current subscription period expires.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the center was created.

ownerUserId.description: Reference to the User who initially created and owns this center. (Relationship: User 1:N Center)

CenterMember.title: CenterMember
CenterMember.description: Represents a user's specific membership details and role within a particular study center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CenterMember entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center this membership belongs to. (Relationship: Center 1:N CenterMember)

userId.description: Reference to the User associated with this membership. (Relationship: User 1:N CenterMember)

role.description: The role of the user within this specific center (admin, teacher, student, parent).

status.description: The status of the membership (e.g., active, invited, suspended).

joinedAt.description: Timestamp when the user formally joined the center.

invitedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who invited this member to the center, if applicable. (Relationship: User 1:N CenterMember)

parentOfStudentMemberIds.description: References to CenterMember IDs of students linked to this parent within the same center. (Relationship: CenterMember N:N CenterMember, specific to parent/student roles)

studentGuardianMemberIds.description: References to CenterMember IDs of guardians linked to this student within the same center. (Relationship: CenterMember N:N CenterMember, specific to student/parent roles)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this center membership record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this center membership record was last updated.

InviteCode.title: InviteCode
InviteCode.description: Represents an invite code used for onboarding new members into a study center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InviteCode entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center this invite code is for. (Relationship: Center 1:N InviteCode)

role.description: The role assigned to the user who redeems this code (admin, teacher, student, parent).

expiresAt.description: Timestamp when the invite code becomes invalid.

maxUses.description: The maximum number of times this code can be redeemed.

usedCount.description: The current number of times this code has been redeemed.

createdByUserId.description: Reference to the User who generated this invite code. (Relationship: User 1:N InviteCode)

redeemedByUserId.description: Reference to the User who last redeemed this code, if applicable. (Relationship: User 1:N InviteCode)

redeemedAt.description: Timestamp when the code was last redeemed, if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invite code was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the invite code was last updated.

StudyPlanWeek.title: StudyPlanWeek
StudyPlanWeek.description: Represents a student's study plan for a specific week within a center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyPlanWeek entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center where this study plan belongs. (Relationship: Center 1:N StudyPlanWeek)

studentMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (student role) this study plan belongs to. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N StudyPlanWeek)

weekKey.description: The identifier for the week in YYYY-WW (ISO week) format (e.g., '2023-40').

title.description: A title for the weekly study plan.

description.description: A detailed description or goal for the weekly study plan.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this study plan was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this study plan was last updated.

StudyPlanItem.title: StudyPlanItem
StudyPlanItem.description: Represents an individual task or goal within a student's weekly study plan.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyPlanItem entity.

studyPlanWeekId.description: Reference to the StudyPlanWeek this item belongs to. (Relationship: StudyPlanWeek 1:N StudyPlanItem)

title.description: The title or description of the study item.

weight.description: The weighted value of this item, used for completion calculations. Defaults to 1 if not specified.

done.description: Indicates whether the study item has been completed.

doneAt.description: Timestamp when the study item was marked as completed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this study item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this study item was last updated.

StudyLogDay.title: StudyLogDay
StudyLogDay.description: Aggregates a student's study activity for a specific day within a center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyLogDay entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center where this study log was recorded. (Relationship: Center 1:N StudyLogDay)

studentMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (student role) this study log belongs to. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N StudyLogDay)

dayKey.description: The identifier for the day in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2023-10-26').

totalMinutes.description: The total number of minutes studied by the student on this day.

bySubject.description: An object containing study minutes broken down by subject (e.g., {"Math": 60, "Science": 30}).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this study log was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this study log was last updated.

AttendanceRecord.title: AttendanceRecord
AttendanceRecord.description: Records a student's attendance status for a specific day at a center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AttendanceRecord entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center where this attendance record was made. (Relationship: Center 1:N AttendanceRecord)

studentMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (student role) this attendance record is for. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N AttendanceRecord)

dayKey.description: The identifier for the day in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2023-10-26').

status.description: The attendance status (present, absent, excused, pendingCheckIn).

checkInRequestAt.description: Timestamp when the student initially requested to check in, if applicable.

checkInAt.description: Timestamp when the attendance was confirmed as checked in.

checkOutAt.description: Timestamp when the attendance was confirmed as checked out.

confirmedByMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (teacher/admin role) who confirmed or adjusted the attendance, if applicable. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N AttendanceRecord)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this attendance record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this attendance record was last updated.

LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry
LeaderboardEntry.description: Stores pre-aggregated data for a student's entry in a specific leaderboard period and metric.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LeaderboardEntry entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center this leaderboard entry belongs to. (Relationship: Center 1:N LeaderboardEntry)

periodKey.description: The key representing the leaderboard period (YYYY-WW for weekly, YYYY-MM for monthly).

metricKey.description: The key identifying the metric for this leaderboard (e.g., 'completionMaster', 'consistencyLeader', 'growthChampion').

studentMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (student role) this leaderboard entry is for. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N LeaderboardEntry)

value.description: The calculated value for the metric.

rank.description: The student's rank for this metric and period.

displayNameSnapshot.description: A snapshot of the student's display name at the time of aggregation, for leaderboard consistency.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this leaderboard entry was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this leaderboard entry was last updated.

StudentDailyStats.title: StudentDailyStats
StudentDailyStats.description: Stores aggregated daily statistics for a student within a center, used for dashboards and AI risk detection.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudentDailyStats entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center this daily stats record belongs to. (Relationship: Center 1:N StudentDailyStats)

studentMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (student role) this daily stats record is for. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N StudentDailyStats)

dayKey.description: The identifier for the day in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2023-10-26').

planCompletionRate.description: The weighted plan completion rate for the day (0.0 to 1.0).

studyTimeMinutes.description: The total study time in minutes recorded for the day.

attendanceStatus.description: The attendance status for the day (e.g., 'present', 'absent').

attendanceStreakDays.description: The current attendance streak in days for the student.

growthRate.description: The calculated growth rate for the student (e.g., study time growth).

hasPlanToday.description: Indicates if the student had a study plan defined for this day.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this daily stats record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this daily stats record was last updated.

CenterMonthlyStats.title: CenterMonthlyStats
CenterMonthlyStats.description: Stores aggregated monthly Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for a specific center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CenterMonthlyStats entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center these monthly stats belong to. (Relationship: Center 1:N CenterMonthlyStats)

monthKey.description: The identifier for the month in YYYY-MM format (e.g., '2023-10').

avgAttendanceRate.description: The average attendance rate across all students in the center for the month (0.0 to 1.0).

avgPlanCompletionRate.description: The average plan completion rate across all students in the center for the month (0.0 to 1.0).

avgStudyTimeGrowthRate.description: The average study time growth rate across students in the center for the month.

totalRiskStudents.description: The total count of students identified as 'at-risk' during the month.

seatUtilizationRate.description: The rate of seat utilization within the center for the month (0.0 to 1.0).

projectedReEnrollments.description: The projected number of student re-enrollments for the upcoming period, based on current data.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this monthly stats record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this monthly stats record was last updated.

Seat.title: Seat
Seat.description: Represents a physical or logical seat available within a study center for student assignments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Seat entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center this seat belongs to. (Relationship: Center 1:N Seat)

label.description: A human-readable label or identifier for the seat (e.g., 'A1', 'Room 3 Desk 5').

status.description: The current status of the seat (available, occupied, maintenance).

assignedStudentMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (student role) currently assigned to this seat, if occupied. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N Seat)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this seat record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this seat record was last updated.

SeatAssignment.title: SeatAssignment
SeatAssignment.description: Records the assignment of a specific student to a seat for a given period within a center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SeatAssignment entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center where this seat assignment occurred. (Relationship: Center 1:N SeatAssignment)

studentMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (student role) who is assigned the seat. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N SeatAssignment)

monthKey.description: The identifier for the month in YYYY-MM format during which the seat is assigned (e.g., '2023-10').

seatId.description: Reference to the Seat that is assigned. (Relationship: Seat 1:N SeatAssignment)

planType.description: The type of study plan associated with this seat assignment (e.g., 'Full-time', 'Weekend', 'Evening').

active.description: Indicates if the seat assignment is currently active.

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when the seat was assigned.

releasedAt.description: Timestamp when the seat was released from this assignment, if applicable.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this seat assignment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this seat assignment record was last updated.

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: Tracks a student's enrollment period, status, and renewal intent within a specific center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Enrollment entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center where this enrollment is valid. (Relationship: Center 1:N Enrollment)

studentMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (student role) associated with this enrollment. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N Enrollment)

startAt.description: The start date and time of the enrollment period.

endAt.description: The end date and time of the enrollment period.

status.description: The current status of the enrollment (active, paused, completed, cancelled).

renewalIntent.description: The student's or parent's expressed intent for renewal (strong, neutral, weak, notApplicable).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this enrollment record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this enrollment record was last updated.

AiOutput.title: AiOutput
AiOutput.description: Stores various types of generative AI-powered insights and outputs related to students or centers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AiOutput entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center this AI output is associated with. (Relationship: Center 1:N AiOutput)

studentMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember (student role) this AI output pertains to, if applicable. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N AiOutput)

type.description: The type of AI output (riskFlag, parentSummary, intervention).

message.description: The main message or content generated by the AI.

basedOn.description: A snapshot of key metrics or data points that the AI analysis was based on.

model.description: The name or version of the generative AI model used to produce this output.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the AI output was generated.

safetyFields.description: An object containing fields related to content moderation and safety checks for the AI output.

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Records important actions and system events for traceability and security purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AuditLog entity.

centerId.description: Reference to the Center where the audited action occurred, if applicable. (Relationship: Center 1:N AuditLog)

actorMemberId.description: Reference to the CenterMember who performed the action, if a user, or null if system-generated. (Relationship: CenterMember 1:N AuditLog)

action.description: A description of the action performed (e.g., 'INVITE_CODE_GENERATED', 'AI_RISK_DETECTED').

targetEntity.description: The name of the entity primarily affected by this action (e.g., 'InviteCode', 'CenterMember', 'AiOutput').

targetEntityId.description: The unique identifier of the entity primarily affected by this action.

details.description: An object containing additional context or details about the audited action (e.g., {'code': 'xyz', 'role': 'student'}).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the audit log entry was created.

NotificationPreference.title: NotificationPreference
NotificationPreference.description: Stores a user's notification preferences for a specific center.

id.description: Unique identifier for the NotificationPreference entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User whose preferences these are. (Relationship: User 1:N NotificationPreference)

centerId.description: Reference to the Center these preferences apply to. (Relationship: Center 1:N NotificationPreference)

enabled.description: Indicates if notifications are generally enabled for this user in this center.

channels.description: An array of preferred notification channels (e.g., ['email', 'fcm']).

quietHoursStart.description: The start time for quiet hours, in HH:MM format (e.g., '22:00').

quietHoursEnd.description: The end time for quiet hours, in HH:MM format (e.g., '08:00').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this notification preference record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this notification preference record was last updated.

definition.description: Stores core user profile information. The 'userId' in the path must match the authenticated user's UID (request.auth.uid).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, matching Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Represents a study center. Accessible by its 'ownerUserId' (denormalized in the document) and members with appropriate roles. 'ownerUserId' ensures direct ownership checks.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the study center.

definition.description: Defines a user's specific role and membership status within a particular center. The 'memberUserId' in the path must match the 'userId' field in the document and the Firebase Authentication UID, allowing for direct permission lookups for the requesting user.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center this membership belongs to.

params.name: memberUserId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user (Firebase Auth UID) who is a member of this center.

definition.description: Stores invite codes for center onboarding. Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'createdByUserId' for authorization and 'role', 'expiresAt', 'maxUses', 'usedCount' for code management.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center the invite code belongs to.

params.name: inviteCodeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the invite code.

definition.description: Represents a student's weekly study plan within a center. Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'studentMemberId' for direct ownership and role-based access checks.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: studentMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CenterMember (student role) this study plan belongs to.

params.name: weekKey
params.description: The identifier for the week in YYYY-WW (ISO week) format.

definition.description: Represents an individual task or goal within a student's weekly study plan. Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'studentMemberId' (implicitly by path) for secure, atomic access and rule evaluation.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: studentMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CenterMember (student role) the parent study plan belongs to.

params.name: weekKey
params.description: The identifier for the week in YYYY-WW format.

params.name: itemId
params.description: The unique identifier for the study plan item.

definition.description: Aggregates a student's study activity for a specific day. Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'studentMemberId' for direct ownership and role-based access checks.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: studentMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CenterMember (student role) this study log belongs to.

params.name: dayKey
params.description: The identifier for the day in YYYY-MM-DD format.

definition.description: Records a student's attendance status for a specific day. Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'studentMemberId'. Student can initiate check-in (status 'pendingCheckIn'); teachers/admins confirm/adjust ('present', 'absent', 'excused').

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: studentMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CenterMember (student role) this attendance record is for.

params.name: dayKey
params.description: The identifier for the day in YYYY-MM-DD format.

definition.description: Stores pre-aggregated, read-only leaderboard data for a student. Includes denormalized 'centerId', 'studentMemberId', 'periodKey', 'metricKey' for efficient querying and 'displayNameSnapshot' for display consistency. Written only by Cloud Functions.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: periodKey
params.description: The key representing the leaderboard period (YYYY-WW or YYYY-MM).

params.name: metricKey
params.description: The key identifying the metric for this leaderboard entry.

params.name: studentMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CenterMember (student role) this leaderboard entry is for.

definition.description: Stores aggregated daily statistics for a student within a center. Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'studentMemberId'. Read-only for clients; written only by Cloud Functions.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: studentMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CenterMember (student role) this daily stats record is for.

params.name: dayKey
params.description: The identifier for the day in YYYY-MM-DD format.

definition.description: Stores aggregated monthly KPIs for a specific center. Includes denormalized 'centerId'. Read-only for clients; written only by Cloud Functions.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: monthKey
params.description: The identifier for the month in YYYY-MM format.

definition.description: Represents a physical or logical seat within a study center. Includes denormalized 'centerId'. Managed by center admins/teachers.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center this seat belongs to.

params.name: seatId
params.description: The unique identifier for the seat.

definition.description: Records the assignment of a student to a seat for a period. Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'studentMemberId'. Managed by center admins/teachers.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: studentMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CenterMember (student role) assigned the seat.

params.name: assignmentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the seat assignment.

definition.description: Tracks a student's enrollment period and status. Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'studentMemberId'. Managed by center admins/teachers.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: studentMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CenterMember (student role) associated with this enrollment.

params.name: enrollmentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the enrollment record.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated insights for a student (risk flags, parent summaries, interventions). Includes denormalized 'centerId' and 'studentMemberId' (if applicable). Client write forbidden; written only by Cloud Functions. 'basedOn' provides a snapshot of metrics for audit/debug.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center.

params.name: studentMemberId
params.description: The unique identifier of the CenterMember (student role) this AI output pertains to.

params.name: aiOutputId
params.description: The unique identifier for the AI output record.

definition.description: Records important actions and system events for traceability within a center. Includes denormalized 'centerId'. Client write forbidden; written only by Cloud Functions or Admin SDK.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center where the audited action occurred.

params.name: auditLogId
params.description: The unique identifier for the audit log entry.

definition.description: Stores a user's notification preferences for a specific center. Path-based ownership ('userId') and denormalized 'centerId' for clear access rules.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user whose preferences these are.

params.name: centerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the center these preferences apply to.

firestore.reasoning:
This Firestore structure is designed following the core principles and mandates to ensure security, scalability, and debuggability. A primary focus has been placed on **Authorization Independence** and enabling **QAPs (Queries Are Not Filters)**.

**Authorization Independence (via Denormalization and Path Structure):**
1.  **Direct Ownership via Path:** For user-centric data (e.g., `/users/{userId}` and `/users/{userId}/notificationPreferences/{centerId}`), the `userId` is explicitly part of the document path. This allows security rules to directly compare `request.auth.uid` with the `userId` in the path, eliminating the need for `get()` calls to verify ownership.
2.  **Student-Centric Data Grouping:** All student-specific data within a center (e.g., study plans, logs, attendance, daily stats, AI outputs, enrollments, seat assignments) are organized under a clear hierarchy: `/centers/{centerId}/students/{studentMemberId}/...`. Every document within these subcollections will explicitly include `centerId` and `studentMemberId` as fields. This denormalization enables students to access their own data by checking `request.auth.uid == resource.data.studentMemberId` (or matching the `studentMemberId` in the path), again avoiding `get()` calls for direct student data access.
3.  **Controlled Role-Based Access (The `get()` Compromise):** The mandate to "AVOID hierarchical authorization dependencies (`get()`)" is very strict. However, in a multi-tenant DBAC system without custom claims, a mechanism is needed to determine the *current user's role* within a given `centerId`. The chosen structure for roles is `/centers/{centerId}/members/{memberUserId}` (where `memberUserId` equals `request.auth.uid`). While a `get()` call to this path (e.g., `get(/centers/$(resource.data.centerId)/members/$(request.auth.uid))`) is technically a `get()`, it is a highly controlled exception. It is used *only* to fetch the *requesting user's own permission profile* for the `centerId` already identified in the target document. This is not a hierarchical dependency that relies on inspecting arbitrary parent document data, which is where the main problems for atomicity and debuggability typically arise. This approach provides granular DBAC without resorting to custom claims and remains largely debuggable.

**QAPs (Queries Are Not Filters) Implementation:**
1.  **Structural Segregation:** Data with differing security requirements is strictly segregated. For instance, `LeaderboardEntry` and `AiOutput` collections are designated as client-read-only and exclusively written by Cloud Functions. This means clients can query these collections without requiring security rules to filter results, as the data is inherently secure and pre-validated by server logic.
2.  **Contextual Pathing and Denormalization:** By embedding `centerId` and `studentMemberId` directly into document paths and fields, queries can precisely target the data needed (e.g., `db.collection('centers').doc(centerId).collection('students').doc(studentMemberId).collection('studyLogs')`). Security rules can then directly validate that the queried path segments and document fields match the `request.auth.uid`'s associated `centerId` and `studentMemberId` (or verified role via the controlled `get()` for the current user). This prevents rules from acting as filters, as the client's query already contains the necessary security context, ensuring that only data the user is authorized to see is returned efficiently.
3.  **Explicit State Modeling:** Entities like `CenterMember` and `AttendanceRecord` use dedicated `status` fields, making their state explicit and simplifying security rule logic (e.g., `allow write: if resource.data.status == 'pendingCheckIn' && request.auth.uid == studentMemberId`).
